name: integration_geoduels__i_built_a_100_free_geoguessr
method: GeoDuels - I built a 100% free GeoGuessr clone in my mom's basement

phases.name: research
steps: scrape top 'free geoguessr' search results for gap analysis
identify 10 niche variants with search demand but no free clone
audit existing surge.sh slots (47/65 live — check capacity)

phases.name: build_base
steps: build HTML/JS geo-game template using OpenStreetMap (free, no API key)
add freemium gate: 5 rounds free, premium unlocks unlimited ($2.99/mo RevenueCat web)

phases.name: generate_variants
steps: parameterize base template across 10 niche configs
generate SEO landing page per variant (longtail: 'free [niche] geography game')
generate dev story content post for each (r/SideProject format)

phases.name: deploy
steps: verify Playwright smoke test: game loads, rounds work, AdSense fires
submit all URLs to Google Search Console

phases.name: distribute
steps: post dev story to r/SideProject (highest ROI — GeoDuels proof)
route content through engagement_bait_converter.py for Twitter/IH/HN
